hooks.command: input=$(cat 2>/dev/null); if echo "$input" | grep -q 'knowledge' && [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: searching knowledge/github/ — read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before grepping raw files."}}'; fi
